name: OCAP2 Web
author: ocap2@github.com
description: OCAP2 Web Server — archives and replays Arma 3 military simulation missions on interactive Leaflet maps. Provides a web interface for browsing operations, streaming playback, and mission upload via API.

installation.script:
#!/bin/ash
set -eu

## Create persistent data directories
mkdir -p /mnt/server/data /mnt/server/db /mnt/server/maps

## Fix ownership so the container user (UID 1000) can write to them
chown -R 1000:1000 /mnt/server

echo "Installation complete"

variables.name: OCAP Secret
variables.description: Shared secret for mission uploads and streaming authentication. Must be changed from the default.

variables.name: Listen Address
variables.description: Address and port the server binds to. Uses the Pterodactyl-allocated port by default.

variables.name: Database Path
variables.description: Path to the SQLite database file.

variables.name: Data Directory
variables.description: Directory for mission data files (uploads and converted protobuf).

variables.name: Enable Conversion
variables.description: Enable background conversion of JSON missions to chunked protobuf format for faster streaming playback.

variables.name: Enable Streaming
variables.description: Enable the WebSocket streaming endpoint for live mission data ingestion from Arma 3.

variables.name: Allowed Steam IDs
variables.description: Comma-separated list of Steam64 IDs authorized for admin login via Steam OpenID. Leave empty to disable Steam admin login.

variables.name: Steam API Key
variables.description: Steam Web API key for fetching player display names and avatars. Get one at https://steamcommunity.com/dev/apikey. Optional — without it, the admin badge shows the Steam ID instead of a name.

variables.name: CSS Overrides
variables.description: JSON object of CSS variable overrides for UI theming. Example: {"--accent-primary":"#fcb00d","--bg-dark":"#1a2a1a","--text-on-accent":"#1a2a1a"}
